resolved.description:
Temporal Ridge regression on e5_timebased_60s_v3p0 (98-feat, 60s bins,
162 train + 35 val + 33 test days). First-live-experiment for the
Phase Q Trainer Spine Unification cycle: validates that
`python scripts/train.py --config <sklearn-yaml>` succeeds end-to-end
via the framework-aware factory dispatch (Q.5) → SimpleModelTrainer
(Q.6) → canonical signal_metadata SSoT (Q.7) + atomic write (Q.8).

Note: the original 2026-05-04 v3p0 cycle pointed at
`nvda_xnas_128feat_regression_fwd_prices_v3p0` but that export has
only train/ (no val/test) — a producer-side issue tracked in
PHASE_P_BACKLOG. This config uses the e5_60s baseline which has
full splits and exercises the Phase Q chain end-to-end.
resolved.name: TemporalRidge_NVDA_H10_e5_60s_v3p0
